zh.lifeSummary: 當Prince Rhys Gryg於1165年出生時，他的父親Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales42歲，母親Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis34歲。他和Joan de Clare至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他於1195年登記服兵役。他去世於1234年在威爾士卡馬特史爾利安迪洛法福享年69歲，埋葬在威爾士布洛可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Gryg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gregg
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): from the Middle English personal name Greg, a pet form of Gregory ; compare Grigg .

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Prince Rhys Gryg was born in 1165, his father, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, was 42 and his mother, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, was 34. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Joan de Clare. He registered for military service in 1195. He died in 1234, in Llandilofawr, Carmarthenshire, Wales, at the age of 69, and was buried in Pembrokeshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Prince Rhys Gryg est né en 1165, son père, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Joan de Clare. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1195. Il est décédé en 1234, à Llandilofawr, Carmarthenshire, Galles, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Pembrokeshire, Galles.

de.Llanfihangel Cwm-du, Breconshire, Wales: Llanfihangel Cwm-du, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Prince Rhys Gryg 1165 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales 42 und seine Mutter Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis 34. Er hatte mit Joan de Clare mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1195 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1234 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Llandilofawr, Carmarthenshire, Wales und wurde in Pembrokeshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Prince Rhys Gryg è nato il nel 1165, il suo padre, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Joan de Clare. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1195. Morì nel 1234, nel Llandilofawr, Carmarthenshire, Galles, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Pembrokeshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Prince Rhys Grygが1165年に生まれた時，父Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Walesは42歳，母Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powisは34歳であった。彼はJoan de Clareとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1195年に兵役登録をした。彼は1234年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランデロファウルで69歳で死去し，ウェールズペンブロケシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Prince Rhys Gryg(이)가 1165년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Joan de Clare(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1195년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1234년 웨일스 카마테실르 랜디로파르에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 p브로케실르에 묻혔다.

pt.Llanfihangel Cwm-du, Breconshire, Wales: Llanfihangel Cwm-du, Breconshire, Gales, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Prince Rhys Gryg nasceu em 1165, seu pai, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, tinha 34 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Joan de Clare. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1195. Ele faleceu em 1234, em Llandilofawr, Carmarthenshire, Gales, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Pembrokeshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Prince Rhys Gryg родился в 1165 г., его отцу по имени Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, 34. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Joan de Clare. В 1195 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1234 г. в местности лландилофар, кармартеншир, Уэльс в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Joan de Clare. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1195. Murió en 1234, en Llandilofawr, Carmarthenshire, Gales, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Pembrokeshire, Gales.
